changelog: Continue Watching is back as the default first section on Home — when you have anything in progress, it now lands on Resume on launch, like it used to. Cross-device sync (FireStick ↔ Shield ↔ Mobile) is automatic via the same SyncEngine that already runs every 30s.

Side-rail RIGHT-arrow now reliably focuses the FIRST visible card of the current section. Root cause was the first-card focus requester being attached to a focusGroup wrapper instead of directly to the card itself — fixed across all 6 home rows (Resume, Discovery, Streaming Services, Collections, Genres, Themes & Moods, Decades).
Themes & Moods row continues to live above the Decades row on Home (from v1.43.91).
